meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS starter kit to Solve stuck with basic apps (Advanced Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Advanced-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: SaaS Starter Kit: Scale Your Freelance Agency Fast
content.seo_description: Break free from basic app limitations. Use this advanced SaaS starter kit guide with Antigravity and Claude Code to ship enterprise-grade products faster.
content.answer_block: Stop hand-coding boilerplate. By integrating a modular SaaS starter kit with AI-driven development tools like Antigravity and Claude Code, you bypass the 'basic app' trap. This workflow automates authentication, database schemas, and billing, allowing you to focus purely on high-value business logic and rapid client deployment.
content.intro:
The freelance graveyard is littered with half-baked MVPs that never scaled. You know the feeling: you spend 80% of your time configuring Auth0, Stripe webhooks, and database migrations, leaving only a fraction of your energy for the actual product features your client is paying for. It is a slow, grinding death by boilerplate that keeps you trapped in the 'basic app' cycle.

But the game has changed. The elite 1% of developers aren't coding from scratch; they are orchestrating systems. By leveraging a high-performance SaaS starter kit, you transform your workflow from manual labor to architectural oversight. It is time to stop building apps and start deploying engines.

steps.title: Architectural Foundation
steps.description: Initialize your project with a production-ready stack that includes pre-configured middleware and secure session management.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a Next.js 15 project with TypeScript, Tailwind, and Supabase integration. Include a secure authentication flow and role-based access control.

steps.title: Database Schema Generation
steps.description: Automate the creation of relational models to ensure data integrity without writing raw SQL migrations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Prisma schema for a SaaS platform including Users, Organizations, Subscriptions, and FeatureFlags with proper indexing.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'npx prisma migrate dev --name init_schema'

steps.title: Stripe Subscription Logic
steps.description: Implement a robust billing layer that handles webhooks and plan upgrades seamlessly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Stripe webhook handler for subscription events including checkout.session.completed and customer.subscription.updated.

steps.title: Component Library Injection
steps.description: Inject professional-grade UI components that are accessible, responsive, and themeable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Integrate Shadcn UI components optimized for a dashboard layout including sidebar, data tables, and toast notifications.

steps.title: Automated Testing Suite
steps.description: Ensure your production environment is bulletproof by generating unit and integration tests automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Playwright end-to-end tests for the authentication flow and subscription purchase journey.

pro_tips: Always use environment-specific secret managers; never hardcode API keys even in dev environments.
Configure your SaaS starter kit to use 'pnpm' to leverage global content-addressable storage, saving gigabytes of disk space.
Implement feature flags from day one; it allows you to ship broken code safely without impacting production users.
Use Claude Code to document your codebase automatically by running a commit-hook that generates README.md updates.
Standardize your database naming conventions early to prevent 'schema drift' when scaling to multiple client projects.
content.next_steps: Once your environment is set up, focus on building one 'Unique Selling Point' feature that differentiates your client's app from generic templates, then deploy to Vercel.
content.conversion_block: Stop wasting hours on boilerplate and start delivering high-impact SaaS solutions that scale. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
